rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) has no bearing on §11.18, which governs exemptions for charitable organizations. The two sections address entirely separate exemption categories with no overlapping operative provisions.
quote: Sec. 11.18. CHARITABLE ORGANIZATIONS. (a) An organization that qualifies as a charitable organization as provided by this section is entitled to an exemption from taxation of:
_note: No conflict. §11.18 addresses charitable organization exemptions; the proposed change targets the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b). The sections are substantively unrelated.
